summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Tasneem Monib portfolio after major refinement (13 changes). All 14 test requirements passed. Project order verified (7 projects in correct sequence), HEART Program removed, 'View Project' buttons confirmed, project titles updated, deliverables UX working correctly (clickable files + plain text supporting work), Instagram embeds with 'View on Instagram' buttons working, all media galleries and video players functional.

INK Collective has no deliverables/supporting work sections. Springtime Pediatrics has 2 Instagram embeds with 'View on Instagram' buttons. Sports Marketing has 7 gallery images + 3 native video players. Fifth Ward has YouTube embed. All navigation working.
